doc_title_en: Notice Regarding Full Acquisition of All Shares of Ogawa Shinkoku Shoten Co., Ltd. (Complete Subsidiary)

key_facts.reason_jp: 東北エリア全域をカバーする鋼材販売チャネルの確立

summary_en: 24,000 shares (100% stake) of Ogawa Shinkoku Shoten (steel materials wholesaler, Sendai) to be acquired. Acquisition price not disclosed; third-party due diligence and valuation performed. Board decision 28 April 2026, contract executed 30 April 2026, settlement scheduled 1 July 2026. Objective: establish full Tohoku region steel-sales channel by integrating target with existing northeast regional network.
summary_jp: 小川真功商店（仙台の鋼材問屋）の全株式24,000株を取得。取得価額は非開示だが第三者機関による適正評価済み。取締役会決議4月28日、契約締結4月30日、譲渡実行7月1日予定。東北全域の鋼材販売チャネル確立が目的。
tag_en: M&A - Ogawa Shinkoku Shoten (24,000 shares, 100% stake) - Steel trading consolidation - Closing July 2026
tag_jp: M&A - 小川真功商店（24,000株、100%取得） - 鋼材流通統合 - 2026年7月クロージング予定
